title: rosa sylvestris var. subatrata
intro: Rosa sylvestris var. subatrata is a variety of wild rose that belongs to the Rosaceae family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible hips. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rosa sylvestris var. subatrata include its ability to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Rosa sylvestris var. subatrata is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and infuscos to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
